code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut sum = 0
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  mut in_tok = false
  mut cur = 0
  mut neg = false
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    let is_digit = b >= 48 and b <= 57
    let is_sign = b == 45 or b == 43
    if is_digit
      if not in_tok
        in_tok = true
        cur = 0
        neg = false
      end
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
    else if is_sign and not in_tok
      in_tok = true
      cur = 0
      neg = b == 45
    else
      if in_tok
        if neg
          cur = -cur
        end
        sum = sum + cur
        if first
          out = "#{sum}"
          first = false
        else
          out = "#{out} #{sum}"
        end
        in_tok = false
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_tok
    if neg
      cur = -cur
    end
    sum = sum + cur
    if first
      out = "#{sum}"
      first = false
    else
      out = "#{out} #{sum}"
    end
  end
  println(out)
end
